mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question WHERE status = 'OPEN'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question WHERE status = 'CLOSED'

SELECT q.*, u.username as username, u.avatar as user_avatar, c.name as category_name FROM question q LEFT JOIN user u ON q.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON q.category_id = c.id WHERE q.id = #{id}

SELECT q.*, u.username as username, u.avatar as user_avatar, c.name as category_name FROM question q LEFT JOIN user u ON q.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON q.category_id = c.id ORDER BY q.view_count DESC, q.answer_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT q.*, u.username as username, u.avatar as user_avatar, c.name as category_name FROM question q LEFT JOIN user u ON q.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN category c ON q.category_id = c.id ORDER BY q.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
